title: Build a Multimedia Player
description: A multimedia player page with three sections: an audio player with ARIA label and a source element, a video player with ARIA label, a source element, and a track element for captions, and a transcript section with a paragraph summarizing the video content.
objectives: Use aria-label on audio and video elements for screen reader context
Use source elements inside audio and video to specify media files and MIME types
Add a track element with kind, srclang, label, and src for captions
Use three section elements to separate audio, video, and transcript
Write a transcript paragraph for video accessibility

files.name: index.html
files.content:
Multimedia Player

Now Playing: Sailing Away

What is a map method and how does it work?

Transcript

What is a map method and how does it work? The map method is a powerful and widely used function in JavaScript that operates on arrays. It's designed to create a new array by applying a given function to each element of the original array. This method does not modify the original array, but instead returns the new array containing the results of the function applied to each element.
